generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism advisor, I've seen firsthand how targeted, accountable measures like the new domestic surveillance protocols have prevented attacks. Critics claim they're 'overreach,' but these tools are carefully designed to balance security and civil liberties. The 2025 London incident was stopped precisely because of this system. We can't afford to weaken our defenses over theoretical concerns. #NationalSecurityMatters
